title: auth — retention windows
description: Auth's token tables all have short, compliance-driven retention. Refresh tokens retain 90 days post-consumption for audit; password resets + verifications are purged aggressively (no audit value beyond the immediate flow); MFA challenges are ephemeral. JWT signing keys retire but stay verify-capable for 180 days after retirement. JWT deny-list rows self-expire at the underlying JWT's natural exp.
compliance_regimes_referenced: gdpr Art. 5(1)(e) (storage limitation) + Art. 17 (right to erasure) — all tokens cascade on Identity erasure
oauth 2.0 draft-ietf-oauth-security-topics § 4.13 (refresh rotation) — 90-day retention supports post-breach forensics
nist 800-63B § 7.2 (session management) — absolute session lifetime enforced by expires_at + purge cadence
soc 2 CC7.3 (system operations) — audit trails retained per audit module's config, not this module

hot.days: while revoked_at IS NULL AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > now())

purge.trigger: revoked_at OR expires_at older than 90 days
purge.action: hard delete via SanctumPurgeExpiredTokensJob (owned by sanctum, scheduled by our schedule.json)
purge.notes: Retained 90 days post-revocation for audit trace. Beyond 90 days the audit-log module holds the login/logout audit rows; the token row itself is redundant.

purge.trigger: consumed_at OR revoked_at OR expires_at older than 90 days
purge.action: hard delete via PurgeExpiredRefreshTokensJob (runs every 30 minutes)
purge.notes: 90-day tail supports refresh-reuse-detected forensics. Older rows have no audit value.

purge.trigger: consumed_at OR expires_at older than 24 hours
purge.action: hard delete via PurgeExpiredResetTokensJob (runs every 5 minutes)
purge.notes: 24h tail is for immediate post-consumption trace only; longer is unnecessary.

purge.trigger: consumed_at OR expires_at older than 30 days
purge.notes: 30-day tail supports account-creation-audit trace; longer is unnecessary.

purge.trigger: consumed_at OR expires_at older than 1 hour
purge.action: hard delete via PurgeExpiredMfaChallengesJob (runs every 5 minutes)
purge.notes: 1h tail is for challenge-flow-debug trace only.

purge.trigger: consumed_at OR expires_at older than 24 hours
purge.action: hard delete via PurgeExpiredCrossAppGrantsJob (runs every 15 minutes)
purge.notes: 24h tail supports cross-app SSO analytics + debug.

hot.days: until the underlying JWT's natural expires_at passes

purge.notes: After natural expiry, downstream verifiers reject the JWT on their own; the deny-list entry is redundant.

hot.days: while is_active=true OR retired_at + 180 days > now()

purge.action: hard delete via RotateJwtSigningKeyJob (which also handles retirement + purge)
purge.notes: Retired keys stay verify-capable for 180 days (auth.jwt.rotation_grace_period_days determines the JWKS publication window; the 180-day purge floor is an additional forensic tail).

cascade_on_identity_erasure.description: When identity/auth's DELETE /platform/identities/{id} fires IdentityErased(erasure_phase='soft_delete'), auth listeners react:
steps: auth::RevokeAllActiveSessionsListener → revokes every PAT + refresh token for every User referencing the Identity
auth_password_resets cascade via FK onDelete=cascade when the Identity hard-deletes
